name: Fork of Eddy Summoning
description: This Tiny tuning fork crackles with harmless, multicolored magical energy. As a {@action Magic|XPHB} action, you can tap the fork against any object to summon an {@creature Eldritch Eddy|NF} (see appendix B). The eddy appears in an unoccupied space as close to you as possible. The eddy is {@variantrule Friendly [Attitude]|XPHB|Friendly} to you and your allies, and it obeys your commands. If you fail to command it, the eddy defends itself against attackers but takes no other actions. It takes its
